ns0:entry.ns0:title: [go] BishopFox/cloudfox
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/BishopFox/cloudfox
Language: go
Automating situational awareness for cloud penetration tests.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: [go] VersusControl/versus-incident
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/VersusControl/versus-incident
Language: go
Open-source incident management tool with an AI SRE agent that watches your logs, learns normal patterns, and auto-creates incidents — plus webhook alerts, multi-channel notifications, and on-call escalation.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: [go] kubearmor/KubeArmor
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/kubearmor/KubeArmor
Language: go
Runtime Security Enforcement System. Workload hardening/sandboxing and implementing least-permissive policies made easy leveraging LSMs (LSM-BPF, AppArmor).

ns0:entry.ns0:title: [go] voocel/ainovel-cli
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/voocel/ainovel-cli
Language: go
✨多agent实现全自动AI小说生成

ns0:entry.ns0:title: [swift] palmier-io/palmier-pro
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/palmier-io/palmier-pro
Language: swift
macOS video editor built for AI

ns0:entry.ns0:title: [shell] plenaryapp/awesome-rss-feeds
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/plenaryapp/awesome-rss-feeds
Language: shell
Awesome RSS feeds - A curated list of RSS feeds (and OPML files) used in Recommended Feeds and local news sections of Plenary - an RSS reader, article downloader and a podcast player app for android

ns0:entry.ns0:title: [nextflow] bigbio/quantms
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/bigbio/quantms
Language: nextflow
Quantitative mass spectrometry workflow. Currently supports proteomics experiments with complex experimental designs for DDA-LFQ, DDA-Isobaric and DIA-LFQ quantification.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: [plsql] ScalefreeCOM/datavault4dbt
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ScalefreeCOM/datavault4dbt
Language: plsql
Scalefree's dbt package for a Data Vault 2 implementation congruent to the original Data Vault 2 definition by Dan Linstedt including the Staging Area, DV2 main entities, PITs and Snapshot Tables.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: [ruby] travisjeffery/timecop
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/travisjeffery/timecop
Language: ruby
A gem providing "time travel", "time freezing", and "time acceleration" capabilities, making it simple to test time-dependent code. It provides a unified method to mock Time.now, Date.today, and DateTime.now in a single call.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: [mdx] getsentry/develop
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/getsentry/develop
Language: mdx
